## Submission checklist

- [ ] This PR was generated from `submit.html` or follows the same generated YAML schema.
- [ ] This PR adds or edits the intended YAML file under `papers/` or `blogs/`.
- [ ] I did not edit `README.md` or `papers.json` by hand.
- [ ] For blog submissions, the filename follows `blogs/YYYY-MM-DD-shortname.yaml`.
- [ ] For paper submissions, the filename uses the arXiv ID when available, otherwise a stable shortname.

## Notes for reviewers

- Generated YAML path:
- Submission kind: paper / blog
- Any context, caveats, or duplicate-check notes:
- If this PR needs a taxonomy or controlled tag-vocabulary change, list the proposal here and briefly explain why it should be added:
